same_window_requirement: All derived metrics must share the same retained saved-time set and section definition
acceptance_rule: Nonblank window identity for every QOI row

same_window_requirement: U-derived reverse-flow metrics must use the same planes and retained window as Re/Ri/Gz
acceptance_rule: RAF and RMF finite with normals documented

same_window_requirement: Properties and characteristic lengths must match the thermal and pressure QOI window
acceptance_rule: Finite Re/Ri/Gz and property provenance recorded

same_window_requirement: T-derived wall/bulk or wall/core metrics must use the same retained window and upcomer subspan as reverse-flow metrics
acceptance_rule: At least one wall-bulk or wall-core drive is finite with sign convention

same_window_requirement: Pressure metrics must share the same section endpoints and retained window as onset metrics
acceptance_rule: Finite pressure basis plus label; diagnostic basis cannot be fit-promoted

same_window_requirement: Heat ledgers must share retained window and signed source/sink convention
acceptance_rule: Finite residual and source/sink sign convention recorded

same_window_requirement: Uncertainty must be on the same QOIs used for onset admission
acceptance_rule: At least time-window sensitivity now; mesh/time family before closure promotion
